ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the entity (company or individual) */,
  "is_company" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating whether the entity is a company (1) or an individual (0) */,
  "related_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related company, if applicable */,
  "email" TEXT /* Primary email address of the entity */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the entity */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL for companies */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entities_related_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_company_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity the address belongs to */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of the address (e.g., Invoice address, Contact address) */,
  "street" TEXT /* Street address */,
  "zip" TEXT /* ZIP code */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "address_line2" TEXT /* Secondary address line (e.g., suite number) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude for geolocation */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude for geolocation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the address was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity (individual contact) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the contact is associated with */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., Employee, Customer) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Primary email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the contact belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity (company) */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (e.g., Supplier, Client) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)
